title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Rustomjee Group

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Rustomjee Group
jsonLd.description:
Rustomjee Group has an exciting opening for a Real Estate Agent at our Dhanbad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Rustomjee Group:
Rustomjee Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rustomjee Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
